name: Spinach and Grapefruit Salad
recipeIngredient: 3/4 pound fresh spinach, washed and torn (16 cups)
1/2 small jicama, peeled and cut into matchsticks
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat a small skillet over medium heat. Add poppy seeds and toast, stirring constantly, until aromatic, 1-2 minutes; set aside.
2. Place onion slices in a small bowl; add cold water to cover and soak for 10 minutes. Drain.
3. Meanwhile, remove the skin and white pith from grapefruit using a sharp knife. Cut the grapefruit segments from their surrounding membranes and discard the membranes. Reserve the segments in a small bowl. Measure 1/3 cup of the juice and set aside.
4. Place garlic cloves in a small saucepan with water to cover. Bring to a simmer over medium heat; cook until tender, about 3 minutes. Drain.
5. In a blender, combine vinegar, oil, mustard, honey, cooked garlic, and reserved grapefruit juice. Blend until creamy. Season with salt and pepper.
6. In a salad bowl, combine spinach, jicama, and reserved onions and grapefruit sections. Drizzle with the dressing and toss.
7. Arrange on salad plates and garnish with the toasted poppy seeds.
